title: Global Gizmos 37559 Heart Shaped Waffle Maker/Non Stick Plates/Easy to Clean/Fun Food for All The Family/Fluffy Belgian and American Waffles
features: HEART WAFFLE MAKER – This heart shaped waffle maker is the perfect kitchen appliance to provide you with sweet or savoury homemade treats in just a matter of minutes. You can make one large waffle or 5 heart mini waffles in one batch.

NON-STICK COATING – This waffle maker utilises 1000W of power and is super simple to clean thanks to the non-stick hot plates. Once the cooking process is over just let the plates cool down then wipe them clean with a damp cloth.

WAFFLES YOUR WAY – Create delicious waffles to your liking as it comes with a ready to go recipe sheet for both sweet and savoury treats, so you can enjoy trying out new flavour combinations! You’ll know when the machine is ready to be used thanks to the power and ready light indicators on top of the machine.

COOL TOUCH HANDLE – The waffle maker features a cool touch handle that makes the opening and closing of the lid nice and safe during use. The machine will also stay safely secured to the work surface thanks to the non-slip rubber feet at the base of the unit.

GLOBAL GIZMOS – Global Gizmos is the leading manufacturer of a wide range of boardgames, arcade games, tabletop games and many other great products, all of which can be viewed at the Global Gizmos Amazon page.
description: Product Description Heart Shaped Waffle Maker Make tasty sweet and savoury treats This heart shaped waffle maker is the perfect kitchen appliance to provide you with sweet or savoury homemade treats in just a matter of minutes. You can make one large waffle or 5 heart mini waffles in one batch. This waffle maker utilises 1000W of power and is super simple to clean thanks to the non-stick hot plates. Once the cooking process is over just let the plates cool down then wipe them clean with a damp cloth. The waffle maker features a cool touch handle that makes the opening and closing of the lid nice and safe during use. The machine will also stay safely secured to the work surface thanks to the non-slip rubber feet at the base of the unit. KEY FEATURES: Make one large or 5 mini waffles Easy to use Non-stick hot plates Cool touch handle Easy to clean SWEET OR SAVOURY Make sweet or savoury waffles using the included recipe sheet, or try your own flavour combinations! EASY TO USE You’ll know when the machine is ready to be used thanks to the power and ready light indicators on top of the machine. NON-STICK HOT PLATES The waffle maker has non-stick hot plates that can be easily cleaned once cool.
